headline: Tech Experts Warn: Memory Shortage Crisis Won’t Ease Until 2028, and RAM Makers Have No Incentive to Fix It
summary: A recent This Week in Tech (TWiT) episode titled “Flock of SQLs,” explored an unintended consequence of the AI boom that feels meaningful for semiconductor and consumer hardware stocks. A global RAM shortage driven by AI data center demand is forcing device makers to raise prices. The three dominant memory suppliers, SK Hynix, Micron, and ... headline: Housing Stocks Reveal How the Market Grades on a Curve
summary: In the same way a dismal class performance on a business school exam will still yield some A’s, curves also apply in the stock market when a company’s results aren’t necessarily jumping off the page.  Consumer stocks and housing-related companies were hit hard by the oil price spike this year.  On May 19, WTI crude oil hit its most recent peak of more than $109 per barrel, while the 10-year Treasury yield hit its most recent high just below 4.69%.

content.title: Housing Stocks Reveal How the Market Grades on a Curve
content.summary: In the same way a dismal class performance on a business school exam will still yield some A’s, curves also apply in the stock market when a company’s results aren’t necessarily jumping off the page.  Consumer stocks and housing-related companies were hit hard by the oil price spike this year.  On May 19, WTI crude oil hit its most recent peak of more than $109 per barrel, while the 10-year Treasury yield hit its most recent high just below 4.69%.
